content.en:
As time passed, the palpitations in each bone deformation realm became more and more intense.

They all know very well that the upgrade crisis is coming.

Cave of the Ruins.

The Lord of the Ruins also started a meeting, mainly in response to this escalation crisis.

The Lord of the Ruins doesn't know what this crisis is, but he tries his best to make sure that the Cave survives this time.

Only by surviving the crisis can we usher in the next opportunity!

Meanwhile.

I also want to call all the Terrans back, otherwise if you continue to wander in the outside world, it will be easy to fall.

At present, the human race is mainly in the territorial waters of Wanlong and the Taixuan Sea.

Therefore, he only needs to keep these two places.

The years passed.

this day.

The upgrade crisis has finally arrived.

Somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

Click!!!

A direct collapse collapsed, and an unimaginably huge crack appeared.

This is the barrier of the boundary gap directly shattered, connecting with another place.

Then.

Rumble!!!!!

Dense packs of terrifying creatures shuttled out of it.

This is close to the territory of a Blood Transmutation Race.

In an instant, this Blood Transformation Realm race was destroyed, but news also spread.

Next, many Blood Transformation Realm creatures and races in this area were slaughtered one by one, and they couldn't stop the attack of these terrifying creatures at all.

They are like mad demons, destroying and killing everything they see.

......

"The crisis is coming!"

Ye Tian received the news that countless primeval monsters had appeared somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

Strictly speaking, it is the territorial sea boundary gap that is completely connected to the Ancient Demon Abyss, and the Ancient Monster comes from the Ancient Demon Abyss.

The Ancient Demon Abyss is a top realm rift, with a large number of primeval monsters, and even the primeval demons that exist in the bone transformation realm.

In the past, the primeval abyss had also been opened.

However, only the strong people of the territorial sea boundary crack entered the primeval demon abyss, but no primeval monster of the primeval demon abyss entered the territorial sea boundary rift.

I don't know how many ancient monsters there are in the primeval abyss, but there are really too many of them.

The point is that the primeval monsters have no wisdom, and they spend every day in killing, and the primeval demons continue to breed primeval demons, resulting in the number of primeval demons in the primeval demons remaining at a constant number.

Now, it seems that the primeval monsters are about to flood into the boundary of the territorial waters.

This is undoubtedly a disaster for the creatures in the boundary of the territorial waters!

"I'm afraid those weak Blood Transformation Realm races and ordinary forces can't bear it, so they can only choose to flee for their lives!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Knowing what the crisis was, many bone transformation realms breathed a sigh of relief, at least knowing where the crisis was.

The place bordering the Ancient Demon Abyss, even the Lord of the Ruins would not dare to go there.

But the gap in the territorial sea boundary is too big, so those primeval monsters pour into the boundary crack of the territorial sea and gradually disperse, and it is much easier to break them one by one.

However.

Some factions have territories that are very close to the primeval monsters, while others are far away.

Therefore, those forces that are far away do not worry about anything, and are not even willing to care about this matter.

As a result, a group of Bone Transformation Realms gathered together to discuss how to deal with the primeval monsters, and those forces close to the primeval monsters could not block the primeval monsters, and the other forces could sit back and enjoy the results.

In this case, the forces that deal with the primeval monsters will definitely not be happy.

This meeting is to address this issue.

As soon as the meeting began, the Lord of the Bone Transformation Realm of the Ancient Sea Clan, the top overlord-level strength, said: "Everyone, my Ancient Sea Clan is too close to the Ancient Sea Clan, or it won't be long before those Ancient Sea Clans will have to enter the territory of the Owen Ancient Sea Clan, and with our strength, they can't stop it at all." If you don't send reinforcements, I'll have to leave with the Primeval Sea Clan. "

"Lord of Haiyang, if you leave, won't we have to fight it?"

The Lord of the Dragon Emperor frowned.

"Then I don't care, you can do it!"

The main road of Haiyang.

At this time, the Lord of the Void Cave proposed: "We must join forces, after all, our opponent this time is the Ancient Demon Abyss, and the Ancient Demon Abyss's Ancient Monster is unreasonable, and there is no way to communicate." Lord of the Ruins, although you are newly integrated into the territorial sea boundary rift, but this time you have to resist the ancient demon abyss, after all, half of the territorial sea boundary gap territory now belongs to you. "

The Lord of the Chaos said: "Lord of the Void, we will naturally contribute. But this time, the opponent may be the entire Ancient Demon Abyss, and everyone has to work hard, otherwise it is not impossible for the territorial sea boundary rift to be destroyed. "

There was no doubt that all of the Bone Transformation Realms had agreed to work together to deal with the Ancient Monsters.

So, they discussed sending a group of vanguard troops to intercept the primeval monsters.

Moreover, they also have to make a move on these bone transformation realms, otherwise the primeval monsters of the bone transformation realm will make a move, how can those blood transformation realms resist it?

Ye Tian's human race, as a top overlord-level force, naturally had to exert his strength.

Of course, the Terrans are not yet powerful, so they naturally can't compare their strength to other overlord-level forces.

"Let's support the Ancient Sea Clan first!"

The main path of the void.

"Good!"

The other bone metamorphoses agreed.

"Hahaha, thank you then!"

The Lord of Haiyang said excitedly.

After all, if he can not leave the territory, he naturally still doesn't want to leave.

......

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian summoned a group of Terrans in the Blood Transformation Realm and led them to the territory of the Ancient Territorial Sea to intercept the Ancient Monsters.

Of course, this time, there will inevitably be a part of the Terran that will fall.

And he gave a lot of benefits, so there are still a lot of people who are willing to participate in the Terran Blood Transformation Realm.

Even his son Ye Xingchen was ready to bring him over.

Now, Ye Xingchen is also an ancient-level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and his combat power is still okay, as long as he doesn't encounter the Ancient Monster of the Bone Transformation Realm, there will be no big danger.

If he really encounters an ancient monster in the Bone Transformation Realm, his copy mark will also turn into a copy body to block the other party.

Territory of the Archetic Sea Clan.

Whew!!!

A Bone Transformation Realm led a large number of Blood Transformation Realms here.

Then, they waited for the arrival of the primeval monster.

Finally, the primeval monster arrived.

"Let's do it!"

The Lord of the Void said.

Rumble!!!!!

Many bone transformation realms have taken action in unison.

Bang!!!!

In an instant, the primeval monsters in an area were directly shattered and shattered into nothingness.

Ye Tian also made a move, every time he made a move, he could kill a large number of primeval monsters, even the primeval demons of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm were ant-like existences in his hands.

With a large number of primeval monsters being killed, it finally caused the bone transformation realm existence among the primeval monsters to take action.

The real big war begins!
